article.title: Bridging structural and cell biology with cryo-electron microscopy

references.author: CV Robinson
references.unstructured: Robinson, C. V., Sali, A. & Baumeister, W. The molecular sociology of the cell. Nature 450, 973–982 (2007). This seminal review coined the term ‘molecular sociology’ and set the scene for future in situ structural biology that combines cryo-ET with proteomics via integrative modelling.
